head: 50b3a8abbfc342ed7c96c019071d355d63ec733a
inspection_summary: Frozen implementation satisfies the runtime contract: deterministic durable reservations, parallel roles with serial stage barriers, strict independent provenance, verbatim verdict propagation, typed non-pass stops, production composition, and no CLI reverse dependency.
inspection_evidence: Focused final review suite 116 passed, 0 failed; current-head full suite 1743 passed, 0 failed; conformance origin/main 69, current 69, new 0; git diff --check clean.
judgment_delta: Initial risk that restart persistence and production wiring were isolated utilities was rejected: lifecycle E2E proves crash-after-reservation resumes with one history record, production composer installs the owner, and pass/needs_changes/block plus same-session rejection execute through the actual composition path.
